note: Labelled 'Strategic Alliance' but is effectively a commission/referral agreement.

items.risk: Commission unilaterally set by COMPANY in 10-20% range — Bravatek has no certainty on fee
NET 30 from CLIENT payment received — Bravatek bears credit/collection risk
Termination on 90 days notice by either party — convenience kill switch, no ramp-down protection
Non-exclusive arrangement — leads not protected, Bravatek can be cut out
No minimum performance / no exclusivity protections either way
Mutual indemnification limited to negligence + intentional misconduct + breach — narrow
No IP ownership clause for materials created during cooperation
Auto-renewal with 90-day opt-out — modest dark-pattern risk
No specification of how leads are tracked / disputed
Texas governing law + no venue clause — could be ambiguous for non-TX parties

qualitative_tone: should approach the doc as a commission/referral agreement notwithstanding its 'Strategic Alliance' framing
